mapper.select:
SELECT Q.ID, Q.INSP_NO, Q.GR_NO, Q.PO_NO, Q.VD_CD, Q.VD_NM, Q.INSP_QTY, Q.INSP_RESULT, R.CD_NM_KO AS INSP_RESULT_NM, TO_CHAR(Q.INSP_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS INSP_YMD, Q.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, Q.REG_ID FROM QL_INSPECTION Q LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='QL_STS' AND C.CD=Q.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE R ON R.GRP_CD='INSP_RESULT2' AND R.CD=Q.INSP_RESULT AND R.DEL_YN='N' WHERE Q.DEL_YN='N'
AND (Q.INSP_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR Q.GR_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR Q.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND Q.STS=#{sts} ORDER BY Q.ID DESC

SELECT Q.ID, Q.COMP_CD, Q.INSP_NO, Q.GR_ID, Q.GR_NO, Q.PO_NO, Q.VD_CD, Q.VD_NM, Q.OPER_ORG_CD, Q.INSP_TYP, Q.QM_LOT_NO, Q.LOT_NO, TO_CHAR(Q.MFG_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MFG_YMD, TO_CHAR(Q.EXP_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EXP_YMD, Q.INSP_QTY, Q.INSP_RESULT, R.CD_NM_KO AS INSP_RESULT_NM, TO_CHAR(Q.INSP_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS INSP_YMD, Q.INSP_USR_ID, Q.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, Q.REMARK, Q.REG_ID FROM QL_INSPECTION Q LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='QL_STS' AND C.CD=Q.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE R ON R.GRP_CD='INSP_RESULT2' AND R.CD=Q.INSP_RESULT AND R.DEL_YN='N' WHERE Q.ID=#{id} AND Q.DEL_YN='N'

SELECT R.ID, R.INSP_ID, R.ITEM_SEQ, R.INSP_ITEM_NM, R.ITEM_TYP, IT.CD_NM_KO AS ITEM_TYP_NM, R.SPEC_VAL, R.SPEC_LOWER, R.SPEC_UPPER, R.MEASURE_VAL, R.MEASURE_NUM, R.TEST_METHOD, R.UNIT, R.PASS_YN, R.QM_CODE, R.REMARK FROM QL_INSPECTION_RESULT R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE IT ON IT.GRP_CD='INSP_ITEM_TYP' AND IT.CD=R.ITEM_TYP AND IT.DEL_YN='N' WHERE R.INSP_ID=#{inspId} ORDER BY R.ITEM_SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QL_INSPECTION (COMP_CD, INSP_NO, GR_ID, GR_NO, PO_NO, VD_CD, VD_NM, OPER_ORG_CD, INSP_TYP, QM_LOT_NO, LOT_NO, MFG_YMD, EXP_YMD, INSP_QTY, INSP_YMD, INSP_USR_ID, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{inspNo}, #{grId}, #{grNo}, #{poNo}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, #{operOrgCd}, NVL(#{inspTyp},'INCOMING'), #{qmLotNo}, #{lotNo}, TO_DATE(#{mfgYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{expYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{inspQty},0), TO_DATE(#{inspYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{inspUsrId}, 'ING', #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE QL_INSPECTION SET INSP_RESULT=#{inspResult}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE QL_INSPECTION SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE QL_INSPECTION SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QL_INSPECTION_RESULT (INSP_ID, ITEM_SEQ, INSP_ITEM_NM, ITEM_TYP, SPEC_VAL, SPEC_LOWER, SPEC_UPPER, MEASURE_VAL, MEASURE_NUM, TEST_METHOD, UNIT, PASS_YN, QM_CODE, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{inspId}, #{itemSeq}, #{inspItemNm}, #{itemTyp}, #{specVal}, #{specLower}, #{specUpper}, #{measureVal}, #{measureNum}, #{testMethod}, #{unit}, NVL(#{passYn},'Y'), #{qmCode}, #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select:
SELECT G.ID AS GR_ID, G.GR_NO, G.PO_NO, G.VD_CD, G.VD_NM, G.OPER_ORG_CD, TO_CHAR(G.GR_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS INSP_YMD, (SELECT NVL(SUM(GI.GR_QTY),0) FROM GR_RECEIPT_ITEM GI WHERE GI.RECEIPT_ID=G.ID) AS INSP_QTY FROM GR_RECEIPT G WHERE G.DEL_YN='N' AND G.STS='CFM'
AND (G.GR_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR G.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
ORDER BY G.ID DESC

SELECT G.ID AS GR_ID, G.GR_NO, G.PO_NO, G.VD_CD, G.VD_NM, G.OPER_ORG_CD, (SELECT NVL(SUM(GI.GR_QTY),0) FROM GR_RECEIPT_ITEM GI WHERE GI.RECEIPT_ID=G.ID) AS INSP_QTY, (SELECT GI.LOT_NO FROM GR_RECEIPT_ITEM GI WHERE GI.RECEIPT_ID=G.ID AND GI.LINE_NO=(SELECT MIN(LINE_NO) FROM GR_RECEIPT_ITEM WHERE RECEIPT_ID=G.ID)) AS LOT_NO, (SELECT TO_CHAR(GI.MFG_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM GR_RECEIPT_ITEM GI WHERE GI.RECEIPT_ID=G.ID AND GI.LINE_NO=(SELECT MIN(LINE_NO) FROM GR_RECEIPT_ITEM WHERE RECEIPT_ID=G.ID)) AS MFG_YMD, (SELECT TO_CHAR(GI.EXP_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM GR_RECEIPT_ITEM GI WHERE GI.RECEIPT_ID=G.ID AND GI.LINE_NO=(SELECT MIN(LINE_NO) FROM GR_RECEIPT_ITEM WHERE RECEIPT_ID=G.ID)) AS EXP_YMD FROM GR_RECEIPT G WHERE G.ID=#{grId} AND G.DEL_YN='N'
